languages.text: "Ihr habt gegen Anthars Edikt, Zusatz 6, Paragraph 8, Abschnitt 193 verstoßen, der besagt: 'Es ist verboten, dem Gefängnisdirektor in die Augen zu sehen.'"
languages.original_text: "You have violated Anthar's Edict, Amendment 6, Paragraph 8, Point 193, which states: 'Raising one's eyes to the prison warden is prohibited.'"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt gegen Anthars Edikt, Zusatz 6, Paragraph 8, Abschnitt 193 verstoßen, der besagt: 'Es ist verboten, dem Gefängnisdirektor in die Augen zu sehen.'"

languages.text: "Вы нарушили пункт 193 параграфа 8 Декрета Антара, поправка №6, гласящий: "Поднимать глаза на тюремного коменданта — запрещено".

traits.locale_text: [draft] "Вы нарушили пункт 193, параграф 8, гласящий: "Поднимать глаза на тюремного коменданта — запрещено".

languages.text: "You have violated Anthar's Edict, Amendment 6, Paragraph 8, Point 193, which states: 'Raising one's eyes to the prison warden is prohibited.'"

languages.text: « Vous avez enfreint l'Édit d'Anthar, amendement 6, paragraphe 8, aléa 193, qui stipule : "Lever les yeux vers le directeur du pénitencier est interdit." »
languages.original_text: "You have violated Anthar's Edict, Amendment 6, Paragraph 8, Point 193, which states: 'Raising one's eyes to the prison warden is prohibited.'"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez enfreint l'Édit d'Anthar, amendement 6, paragraphe 8, aléa 193, qui stipule : "Lever les yeux vers le directeur du pénitencier est interdit." »

languages.text: “你违背了《安萨法令》修正案第6条、第8段、第193点，法案明确规定：禁止朝典狱长翻白眼。”
languages.original_text: "You have violated Anthar's Edict, Amendment 6, Paragraph 8, Point 193, which states: 'Raising one's eyes to the prison warden is prohibited.'"

traits.locale_text: “你违背了《安萨法令》修正案第6条、第8段、第193点，法案明确规定：禁止朝典狱长翻白眼。”

languages.text: «Ha violado el Edicto de Anthar Edict, enmienda 6, párrafo 8, apartado 193, que especifica: "Está prohibido mirar directamente al alcaide de la prisión"».
languages.original_text: "You have violated Anthar's Edict, Amendment 6, Paragraph 8, Point 193, which states: 'Raising one's eyes to the prison warden is prohibited.'"

traits.locale_text: «Ha violado el Edicto de Anthar Edict, enmienda 6, párrafo 8, apartado 193, que especifica: "Está prohibido mirar directamente al alcaide de la prisión"».

languages.text: 「お前はアンサール法令、修正条項第6条、第8節、第193項に違反した。条文にはこう記されている。『囚人が看守に視線を向けることを禁じる』」
languages.original_text: "You have violated Anthar's Edict, Amendment 6, Paragraph 8, Point 193, which states: 'Raising one's eyes to the prison warden is prohibited.'"

traits.locale_text: 「お前はアンサール法令、修正条項第6条、第8節、第193項に違反した。条文にはこう記されている。『囚人が看守に視線を向けることを禁じる』」

languages.text: "Anthar Fermanı, Tadil 6, Paragraf 8, Bent 193'ü ihlal ettin. Yasaya göre 'Hapishane müdürüne bakan bir kimse buradan men edilir.'."
languages.original_text: "You have violated Anthar's Edict, Amendment 6, Paragraph 8, Point 193, which states: 'Raising one's eyes to the prison warden is prohibited.'"

traits.locale_text: "Anthar Fermanı, Tadil 6, Paragraf 8, Bent 193'ü ihlal ettin. Yasaya göre 'Hapishane müdürüne bakan bir kimse buradan men edilir.'."
